evidence_direction_note: RECLASSIFIED 2026-04-11 governance (session b). Concurrent run of 184158Z (same seeds, near-identical metrics). SD-019: mixed (not does_not_support). C1 (cosine_sq_nonredundant < baseline) passes 2/5 seeds; wrong direction in 3/5. C2 (abs cosine_sq < 0.5) passes all 5 seeds -- both streams have low absolute cosine regardless. Substrate-source gap, not a falsification: EMA-based z_harm_a collinear with z_harm_s; nonredundancy loss has nothing stable to grip. SD-022 substrate prediction: C1 passes 4+/5 seeds. SD-011: non_contributory -- tests SD-019 training quality, not the dual-stream architecture claim itself.
